_request_preview: [turn-2] I'm at $7,600 of my $8,000 Bronze out-of-pocket max, deductible met. What do I o
content: Your Bronze deductible is already met, so this $1,000 claim is subject to 40% member coinsurance: you owe **$400**. That brings your accumulated out-of-pocket to exactly **$8,000** — right at your out-of-pocket maximum, but not over it, so this claim is not capped and you pay the full $400.
